full_log: T1[ELVES] Heritage Druid (1/1) — enables Glimpse chain
T3[ELVES] ★ Allosaurus Shepherd — always resolves (can't be countered)
T3[ELVES] ★ Glimpse of Nature — chain begins
T3[ELVES]   Glimpse chain: 3 elves, 3 draws, 6 in play
T4[DNT] Rishadan Port taps Bayou (opp loses 1 mana)
T5[ELVES] Play+crack Verdant Catacombs (−1 life, 19) → Bayou
T5[ELVES] Attack: Heritage Druid, Allosaurus Shepherd, Nettle Sentinel, Dryad Arbor, Llanowar Elves, Allosaurus Shepherd — 7 unblocked → o at 13
T6[DNT] Draw: Thalia, Guardian of Thraben
T6[DNT] Rishadan Port taps Bayou (opp loses 1 mana)

T7[ELVES] Attack: Heritage Druid, Allosaurus Shepherd, Nettle Sentinel, Dryad Arbor, Llanowar Elves, Allosaurus Shepherd, Wirewood Symbiote — Thalia, Guardian of Thraben blocks Nettle Sentinel. Nettle Sentinel deals 2, Thalia, Guardian of Thraben deals 2 back. 0 unblocked damage to player (o at 13)
T7[ELVES]     Thalia, Guardian of Thraben dies.
T8[DNT] Draw: Thalia, Guardian of Thraben
T8[DNT] Rishadan Port taps Bayou (opp loses 1 mana)

T9[ELVES] Attack: Heritage Druid, Allosaurus Shepherd, Dryad Arbor, Llanowar Elves, Allosaurus Shepherd, Wirewood Symbiote, Heritage Druid — Thalia, Guardian of Thraben blocks Heritage Druid. Heritage Druid deals 1, Thalia, Guardian of Thraben deals 2 back. 0 unblocked damage to player (o at 7)
T9[ELVES]     Thalia, Guardian of Thraben dies.
T10[DNT] Rishadan Port taps Bayou (opp loses 1 mana)
T12[DNT] Rishadan Port taps Bayou (opp loses 1 mana)
T12[DNT]   Stoneforge Mystic tutors Kaldra Compleat
T12[DNT]   Skyclave Apparition exiles Allosaurus Shepherd
T12[DNT] Attack: Stoneforge Mystic — 1 unblocked → b at 18
T14[DNT] Rishadan Port taps Bayou (opp loses 1 mana)
T14[DNT]   Skyclave Apparition exiles Dryad Arbor
T14[DNT] Attack: Skyclave Apparition — 2 unblocked → b at 16
T16[DNT] Rishadan Port taps Savannah (opp loses 1 mana)
T16[DNT]   Recruiter tutors Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd
T16[DNT]   Kaldra Compleat equipped to Flickerwisp (+3/+3)
T16[DNT] Attack: Skyclave Apparition, Skyclave Apparition, Flickerwisp — 10 unblocked → b at 6
T17[ELVES] Play+crack Verdant Catacombs (−1 life, 5) → Forest

T18[DNT] Attack: Stoneforge Mystic, Stoneforge Mystic, Skyclave Apparition, Skyclave Apparition, Flickerwisp, Recruiter of the Guard — Allosaurus Shepherd blocks Recruiter of the Guard. Recruiter of the Guard deals 1, Allosaurus Shepherd deals 1 back. 0 unblocked damage to player (b at 5)
T18[DNT]     Recruiter of the Guard dies.
